query: Check implementation readiness — are our GDD, architecture, epics, and stories aligned and complete before we start production?
Before we move into the build phase, verify every mechanic in the GDD actually has an epic or story covering it.
I want a readiness review of our game planning artifacts to find any requirements-traceability gaps.
Are the epics and stories ready to hand to the dev team? Find the gaps others missed in our planning.
Create the epics and stories list from our GDD.
Manage this mid-sprint change — we want to cut the stamina mechanic and rebalance combat.
Validate our Game Design Document against the GDD checklist.
